buildCmd: cd app && (npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir ds-types || true) && npx tailwindcss -c tailwind.ds.config.js -i src/styles.css -o ds-dist/ds-styles.css && mkdir -p ds-dist/fonts && cp public/fonts/*.woff2 ds-dist/fonts/ && sed 's#url(/fonts/#url(#g' public/fonts/riso-fonts.css > ds-dist/fonts/ds-fonts.css

dtsPropsFor.DiffBlockView: block: { type: "diff"; file: string; language?: string; hunks: { header: string; lines: { op: " " | "+" | "-"; text: string }[] }[]; stats?: { additions: number; deletions: number }; sha?: string; committed_sha?: string };
dtsPropsFor.FileTreeBlockView: block: { type: "file-tree"; nodes: Array<{ path: string; status?: "added" | "modified" | "deleted" | "renamed"; children?: Array<{ path: string; status?: "added" | "modified" | "deleted" | "renamed"; children?: unknown[] }> }> };
dtsPropsFor.TerminalBlockView: block: { type: "terminal"; command: string; output: string; exit_code?: number };
dtsPropsFor.ProgressBlockView: block: { type: "progress"; id?: string; title?: string; steps: { label: string; status: "done" | "active" | "pending" | "failed" }[] };
dtsPropsFor.CodeBlockView: block: { type: "code"; file?: string; language?: string; start_line?: number; content: string; highlight_lines?: number[] };
dtsPropsFor.BeforeAfterBlockView: block: { type: "before-after"; file?: string; language?: string; before: { label: string; content: string }; after: { label: string; content: string } };
dtsPropsFor.ErrorBlockView: block: { type: "error"; title: string; file?: string; line?: number; stack?: string; suggestion?: string };
dtsPropsFor.CostBlockView: block: { type: "cost"; input_tokens?: number; output_tokens?: number; total_tokens?: number; estimated_cost?: number; session_total_cost?: number };
dtsPropsFor.FilePeekBlockView: block: { type: "file-peek"; file: string; language?: string; start_line?: number; content: string; total_lines?: number };
dtsPropsFor.CarouselBlockView: block: { type: "carousel"; title?: string; cards: { title: string; subtitle?: string; preview?: string; meta?: string }[] };
dtsPropsFor.LinkPreviewBlockView: block: { type: "link-preview"; url: string; title: string; description?: string; domain?: string };
dtsPropsFor.ListBlockView: block: { type: "list"; title?: string; style?: "bullet" | "numbered" | "check"; items: string[] };
dtsPropsFor.SwatchesBlockView: block: { type: "swatches"; title?: string; schemes: { name?: string; note?: string; colors: { hex: string; name?: string }[] }[] };
